## beehiiv webhooks delete

Delete a webhook by endpoint ID

### Synopsis

Delete a webhook

Delete a webhook subscription from a publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/webhooks/{endpointId}

```
beehiiv webhooks delete <endpointId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv webhooks delete endpoint_123
beehiiv webhooks remove endpoint_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for delete
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
